steps.title: Complete the relative clause
steps.content: The phrase which is why introduces a causal explanation after the main clause. The blank must use normal statement word order and close the sentence with a period, not a question mark.

steps.title: Check order and punctuation
steps.content:
• Choice A: Uses statement word order but incorrectly ends with a question mark.
  • Choice B: Uses normal subject-verb order and a period.
  • Choice C: Inverts the subject and verb unnecessarily.
  • Choice D: Both inverts the word order and uses a question mark.
The answer is B.
